functions.name: soft_delete_inbound_shipment
functions.definition:
BEGIN
  -- Soft delete the inbound shipment
  UPDATE inbound_shipments
  SET deleted_at = NOW()
  WHERE id = shipment_id
    AND deleted_at IS NULL;

  -- Soft delete all related inventory logs
  UPDATE inventory_logs
  SET deleted_at = NOW()
  WHERE inbound_shipment_id = shipment_id
    AND deleted_at IS NULL;
END;

functions.name: check_daily_balance_exists
update_invoice_settings_updated_at
create_inventory_for_product
update_inventory_on_log
deduct_inventory_on_order
handle_new_user
update_daily_cash_balance_for_date
functions.definition:
DECLARE
  v_opening_balance NUMERIC;
  v_prev_date DATE;
  v_record_exists BOOLEAN;
BEGIN
  -- Get previous day's date
  v_prev_date := p_date - INTERVAL '1 day';
  
  -- Check if there's already a record for this date
  SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM daily_cash_balance WHERE balance_date = p_date)
  INTO v_record_exists;
  
  -- If record exists and not forcing update, skip
  IF v_record_exists AND NOT force_update THEN
    RETURN;
  END IF;
  
  -- Calculate opening balance from previous day's closing (UPDATED with force_delete_at filter)
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      dcb.opening_balance +
      (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(final_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE payment_method = 'cash' AND DATE(created_at) = v_prev_date AND status = 'completed' AND deleted_at IS NULL AND force_delete_at IS NULL) +
      (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM cash_transactions WHERE transaction_type = 'income' AND transaction_date = v_prev_date) -
      (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM cash_transactions WHERE transaction_type = 'expense' AND transaction_date = v_prev_date),
      0
    )
  INTO v_opening_balance
  FROM daily_cash_balance dcb
  WHERE dcb.balance_date = v_prev_date;
  
  -- If no previous record found, default to 0
  v_opening_balance := COALESCE(v_opening_balance, 0);
  
  -- Insert or update the record
  IF force_update AND v_record_exists THEN
    -- Update existing record
    UPDATE daily_cash_balance
    SET 
      opening_balance = v_opening_balance,
      notes = COALESCE(notes, '') || ' [Updated: ' || NOW()::TEXT || ']',
      updated_at = NOW()
    WHERE balance_date = p_date;
  ELSE
    -- Insert new record (with conflict handling)
    INSERT INTO daily_cash_balance (balance_date, opening_balance, notes)
    VALUES (p_date, v_opening_balance, 'Auto-generated from transactions')
    ON CONFLICT (balance_date) DO NOTHING; -- Don't override if already exists
  END IF;
END;

functions.name: get_daily_cash_summary
restore_inventory_on_force_delete
functions.definition:
BEGIN
  -- When force_delete_at is set (from NULL to NOT NULL), restore inventory
  IF OLD.force_delete_at IS NULL AND NEW.force_delete_at IS NOT NULL THEN
    -- Restore inventory for each order item (reverse the deduction)
    UPDATE inventory_items
    SET quantity = inventory_items.quantity + oi.quantity
    FROM order_items oi
    WHERE oi.order_id = NEW.id
      AND inventory_items.product_id = oi.product_id;
  END IF;
  
  -- When force_delete_at is unset (from NOT NULL to NULL), deduct inventory again
  IF OLD.force_delete_at IS NOT NULL AND NEW.force_delete_at IS NULL THEN
    -- Deduct inventory for each order item
    UPDATE inventory_items
    SET quantity = inventory_items.quantity - oi.quantity
    FROM order_items oi
    WHERE oi.order_id = NEW.id
      AND inventory_items.product_id = oi.product_id;
  END IF;
  
  RETURN NEW;
END;

functions.name: log_order_update
log_order_creation

log_cash_transaction_changes
functions.definition:
DECLARE
  v_user_id uuid;
  v_changes jsonb;
BEGIN
  -- Get current user ID from app metadata or use a default
  v_user_id := auth.uid();
  
  IF v_user_id IS NULL THEN
    -- If no auth context, try to get from the row being modified
    v_user_id := COALESCE(NEW.created_by, OLD.created_by);
  END IF;

  -- Only proceed if we have a user ID
  IF v_user_id IS NOT NULL THEN
    IF (TG_OP = 'INSERT') THEN
      INSERT INTO cash_transaction_audit_logs (
        cash_transaction_id,
        action,
        changed_by,
        changed_at,
        changes
      ) VALUES (
        NEW.id,
        'created',
        v_user_id,
        now(),
        jsonb_build_object(
          'transaction_date', NEW.transaction_date,
          'transaction_type', NEW.transaction_type,
          'amount', NEW.amount,
          'category', NEW.category,
          'description', NEW.description,
          'notes', NEW.notes
        )
      );
      
    ELSIF (TG_OP = 'UPDATE') THEN
      -- Build changes object only for modified fields
      v_changes := jsonb_build_object(
        'before', jsonb_build_object(
          'transaction_date', OLD.transaction_date,
          'transaction_type', OLD.transaction_type,
          'amount', OLD.amount,
          'category', OLD.category,
          'description', OLD.description,
          'notes', OLD.notes,
          'updated_at', OLD.updated_at
        ),
        'after', jsonb_build_object(
          'transaction_date', NEW.transaction_date,
          'transaction_type', NEW.transaction_type,
          'amount', NEW.amount,
          'category', NEW.category,
          'description', NEW.description,
          'notes', NEW.notes,
          'updated_at', NEW.updated_at
        )
      );
      
      INSERT INTO cash_transaction_audit_logs (
        cash_transaction_id,
        action,
        changed_by,
        changed_at,
        changes
      ) VALUES (
        NEW.id,
        'updated',
        v_user_id,
        now(),
        v_changes
      );
      
    ELSIF (TG_OP = 'DELETE') THEN
      INSERT INTO cash_transaction_audit_logs (
        cash_transaction_id,
        action,
        changed_by,
        changed_at,
        changes
      ) VALUES (
        OLD.id,
        'deleted',
        v_user_id,
        now(),
        jsonb_build_object(
          'transaction_date', OLD.transaction_date,
          'transaction_type', OLD.transaction_type,
          'amount', OLD.amount,
          'category', OLD.category,
          'description', OLD.description,
          'notes', OLD.notes
        )
      );
    END IF;
  END IF;
  
  RETURN COALESCE(NEW, OLD);
END;
